steps.title: Use the instead contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts mythological and heroic subject matter with Daumier's focus on mundane working-class travelers. The word "instead" shows that Daumier turns away from the establishment subject matter.

steps.title: Reject the wrong actions
steps.content: Choice B means explaining in detail, not avoiding. Choice C means mocking through exaggeration, and Choice D means evaluating. The blank needs a word meaning deliberately avoiding or rejecting the mythological and heroic subject matter. The answer is A.
